media.ext_alt_text: In this painting, a woman with long and dark hair is standing in a certain position, her back is partially visible, conveying a sense of mystery.  His cover consists of a light blue and white cloth that shows the sense of movement and freedom.  The soft colors of the background blend beautifully to create a subtle and impactful look.  This image reminds us that simplicity in design can depict depth of emotions and infinite beauty.  The beauty in the movement and natural movements of women creates the spirit of life and energy to this work and invites us to the imaginary world.✨️

media.ext_alt_text: The Bactrian camel, a ghost of the desert’s forgotten whispers, now stands at the precipice of oblivion. Amid the ravages of climate, habitat’s erosion, and human ambition, it fights to remain a shadow in the shifting sands. A silent witness to the desert's ancient song, its vanishing would silence the rhythm of the earth’s most desolate corners. 🐫
